Records.authors: Duhr, Claude, Klemm, Albrecht, Nega, Christoph, Tancredi, Lorenzo
Records.description: 2-loop equal-mass ice cone: (1)-loop banana inserted into 1-loop triangle. 4 massive propagators in $D=2-2\varepsilon$. 6 master integrals. Maximal cuts factorize into banana periods. CY 0-fold geometry.
